english: The pieces of cloth fell on the king

luganda: Omuntu akwata mu kiwanyi ky'okukola ok'emala
english: A person holds in the madness of endless work
My brothers I have good things
For this reason we have many tasks
The chief started playing the drum

luganda: Oluganda lwe lulimi lya bazadde baffe
english: Luganda is the language of our ancestors
Continuing to do the same thing
They die in the death of Jesus
Luganda was a very beautiful language

luganda: Okutuufu ne kyo kye kiyinza kuva eri Katonda
english: Truth is what can come from God
Wild animals are not the way
The keepers protect going after animals
A woman has the ways of her hands

luganda: Abakakasa bajja ku lukewu lwa Katonda
Okutegeeza Oluganda kwa obulungi kye kuziiyiza
Kyokka lukeka lwonna luno lukyali lungi
english: But all this speech was good
She was a widow and he was a man
Going back and entering the car
The chicken gets corn in the compound
They found everything that was in the stomach
